style_effects: Subtle heat haze drifts from Gengar's metallic joints, distorting the environment like a mirage, while glowing blue energy pulses rhythmically along its armor seams. Metallic dust particles swirl in slow motion, catching the cold blue-white light of its aura, which radiates as sharp, geometric shards around its body. The atmosphere is illuminated by an eerie, frosty blue glow, casting sharp shadows that emphasize its angular, reflective form. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
